MINORIS-FREEZE_DRIED.title: Freeze-Dried Chunk
MINORIS-FREEZE_DRIED.description: At the start of your turn, gain 4 Vigor
MINORIS-SMALL_BOW_TIE.title: Small Bow Tie
MINORIS-SMALL_BOW_TIE.description: At the start of combat, upgrade a random card in your hand
MINORIS-TIDY_SMALL_BOW_TIE.title: Tidy Small Bow Tie
MINORIS-TIDY_SMALL_BOW_TIE.description: At the start of your turn, permanently upgrade a random card in your hand
MINORIS-TIDY_SMALL_BOW_TIE.flavor: A neat look lifts the mood.
MINORIS-BANDAGE_ROLL.title: Bandage Roll
MINORIS-BANDAGE_ROLL.description: During your turn, whenever you lose at least 1 HP, heal 1 HP
MINORIS-GILDED_SPHINX.title: Gilded Sphinx
MINORIS-GILDED_SPHINX.description: When you Exhaust a card, add a random 0-cost (non-X) card to your hand
